title: IIASA Place Feature properties
description: Harmonised properties carried by every feature in any place layer (GeoJSON Feature.properties). Geometry stays in the GeoJSON geometry member; cross-frame links live in the separate relations table, not here.

pid.description: Canonical place id. CURIE form prefix:frame.level.localid

level.description: Level within the frame; must be a level defined for that frame in place-vocab.yaml

scheme.description: Source coding system used to mint code/localid

code.description: Source-native stable code (ISO_A3, NUTS_ID, shapeISO, MRGID, HYBAS_ID, RGI region number, UC id)

i_region.description: Legacy IXMP4 join label, kept for back-compat (e.g. 'Africa (R10)', 'Zimbabwe', 'USA|Mississippi')

parent_pid.description: Intra-frame containment parent. Null at a frame root or for flat levels.

path.description: Materialised containment path within the frame, '/'-joined frame.level.localid segments without prefix

sovereign_iso_a3.description: For marine/eez features: ISO_A3 of the sovereign state

disputed.description: True where boundary/sovereignty is contested or ISO code is -99
